name: โซ่รักอัคนี
original_name: โซ่รักอัคนี
title: โซ่รักอัคนี
overview_en: In the South Fai Atchima Watinwanich reunites with rival Kaprao Athitaya Thitsama a spark that could kindle love or reopen old wounds

name: 花織さんは転生しても喧嘩がしたい
original_name: 花織さんは転生しても喧嘩がしたい
title: 花織さんは転生しても喧嘩がしたい
title_en: Hanaori san Still Wants to Fight in the Next Life
overview_en: Once the Demon King now a shut in NEET Ryusei Narukami s second life is anything but peaceful When Meteor Hanaori the Hero who once defeated him suddenly returns as a normal high school girl his world is thrown into chaos Determined to change Ryusei reenters society as a teacher and ends up teaching at her school Their explosive reunion reignites the past and sparks an unexpected love

name: 逆天邪神
title: 逆天邪神
overview_en: Hunted for possessing a heaven defying object Yun Che is a young man in both that life and the next Throwing himself off a cliff to spite his pursuers Yun Che is reincarnated as Xiao Che a recently poisoned teen in another realm Just as hated in this life as the previous one Che must overcome his own hostile clan his own inability to cultivate and his own frosty fiancée

name: Zodiaque
title: Zodiaque
overview_en: Two unhappy coworkers bond under an eccentric boss When tasked with administering office personality tests Susan and Jim choose to resist

name: الراحلون
overview: الوداع هو أمر قد يحدث لأي شخص غدًا والمشاعر التي تبقى بعده ومن خلال موضوع الطب الشرعي الجاد يلتقط الفيلم بعناية مشاعر الحب تجاه الآخرين والوقت الذي عاشوه ملقياً الضوء بهدوء على ظلام مجتمع لا تُعرف فيه أسباب الوفاة
title: الراحلون
overview_en: Goodbye is something that could happen to anyone tomorrow And the feelings that remain afterwards Through the serious subject of forensic medicine it carefully captures the feelings of love for others and the time they lived quietly shedding light on the darkness of a society where the cause of death is unknown

name: The Loyalty Game
title: The Loyalty Game
overview_en: A group of women runs a unique business luring men to expose their infidelity Their newest client Ana lives a seemingly perfect life with her devoted husband until doubt creeps in As he starts to distort her reality Ana teams up with a loyalty tester and their search for truth spirals into a dangerous game of secrets manipulation and power where loyalty becomes a matter of life and death

name: NEEDY GIRL OVERDOSE
title: NEEDY GIRL OVERDOSE
overview_en: In a world where likes are currency and every viewer is a judge OMGkawaiiAngel also known as KAngel is determined to become the ultimate Internet Angel Yet beneath her pastel smile and lively streams there s more than meets the eye

title: Tow

data.overview: Amanda Ogle is a woman living in her aging Toyota Camry on the streets of Seattle. When her car is stolen and impounded, she’s thrust into a relentless legal battle against an indifferent system. What begins as a fight to reclaim her car evolves into a deeply human story of resilience, dignity, and the power of one woman’s voice in the face of systemic failure.
시애틀의 노숙인 여성이었던 어맨다 오글의 실화를 바탕으로 한다. 그는 2만 1,634달러에 달하는 견인 비용 청구서를 받은 후, 자신의 삶과 그 모든 것이 담긴 자동차를 되찾기 위해 견인 업체에 맞서 싸운다.
data.title: 토우

data.overview: Amanda Ogle vive en las calles de Seattle, refugiada en su viejo Toyota Camry. Cuando le roban el coche y las autoridades lo envían al depósito, se ve atrapada en una larga y desgastante lucha contra una burocracia tan implacable como indiferente. Lo que empieza como un intento desesperado por recuperar su único hogar termina convirtiéndose en un conmovedor relato sobre la resistencia, la dignidad y la fuerza de una mujer decidida a hacerse oír frente a un sistema que parece haberla olvidado.

Depois que seu carro é rebocado e ela fica com um chocante reboque de $21.634, uma mulher sem teto trava uma luta incansável para recuperar seu carro — e sua vida — expondo um sistema quebrado e redefinindo o que significa perseverar contra todas as probabilidades.
一位无家可归的西雅图女子车辆被拖走，在收到21634美元的天价拖车费后，她就此展开了一场不屈的抗争，想要夺回自己的车，也重拾自己的人生。这场抗争揭开了体系的漏洞，也重新诠释了何为在绝境中坚守。本影片根据真实故事改编。
data.title: 被拖走的车

data.overview: После угона и эвакуации машины Аманда Огл остаётся на улицах Сиэтла без крыши над головой. Женщина отказывается мириться с абсурдным долгом и произволом бюрократии. Вместе с молодым адвокатом она вступает в изнурительную юридическую битву, чтобы вернуть старую машину. Ей предстоит пройти через череду отказов и бессмысленных процедур, а также найти неожиданную поддержку у женщин, которым тоже пришлось бороться за право быть услышанными.
data.title: На обочине жизни

data.overview: Resnična zgodba o brezdomni Amandi Ogle, ki na ulicah Seattla živi v svoji stari Toyoti Camry. Ko ji avtomobil ukradejo in ga kasneje zasežejo, se znajde sredi neizprosnosnega pravnega boja proti brezbrižnemu sistemu. To, kar se začne kot bitka za vrnitev avtomobila, se razvije v globoko človeško zgodbo o odpornosti, dostojanstvu in moči glasu posameznice ob soočenju s sistemskim neuspehom.
In Seattle wird das Auto einer obdachlosen Frau (Rose Byrne) geklaut und abgeschleppt. Doch daraus wird ein Kampf um Gerechtigkeit, Würde und die Chance, das eigene Leben auf die Reihe zu bekommen.
data.title: Tow - Abgeschleppt

data.overview: 故事改編自一名無家可歸的西雅圖女子，亞曼達奧高的真人真事。她在收到一張高達21634美元的巨額賬單後，努力奪回自己的生活和車。
data.title: 被拖走的車

data.overview: Amanda Ogle is een vrouw die in haar oude Toyota Camry op straat in Seattle woont. Wanneer haar auto wordt gestolen en in beslag genomen, raakt ze verwikkeld in een meedogenloze juridische strijd tegen een onverschillig systeem. Wat begint als een gevecht om haar auto terug te krijgen, ontwikkelt zich tot een diep menselijk verhaal over veerkracht, waardigheid en de kracht van de stem van één vrouw tegenover systeemfalen.

overview_en: Amanda Ogle is a woman living in her aging Toyota Camry on the streets of Seattle When her car is stolen and impounded she s thrust into a relentless legal battle against an indifferent system What begins as a fight to reclaim her car evolves into a deeply human story of resilience dignity and the power of one woman s voice in the face of systemic failure

name: 「きみを愛する気はない」と言った次期公爵様がなぜか溺愛してきます
original_name: 「きみを愛する気はない」と言った次期公爵様がなぜか溺愛してきます
title: きみを愛する気はない と言った次期公爵様がなぜか溺愛してきます
title_en: The Duke s Son Claims He Won t Love Me Yet Showers Me with Adoration
overview_en: An arranged marriage Two complete strangers One adorable romance When cheerful noblewoman Elsa is suddenly wed to the reserved duke to be Julius neither expects their political marriage to spark something more As awkward misunderstandings sweet gestures and growing feelings pile up these newlyweds discover that falling in love might be the easiest and hardest part of married life

name: الفصول الأربعة
overview: تصبح صداقة امتدت لعقود بين ثلاثة أزواج وزوجاتهم تحت المحك حين تنتهي حياة زوجين منهما بالطلاق الأمر الذي يعقّد تقليدهم بالسفر خلال عطلة نهاية الأسبوع الربع سنوية
title: الفصول الأربعة
overview_en: The decades long friendship between three married couples is tested when one divorces complicating their tradition of quarterly weekend getaways
